title: notifications-mail — HTTP middleware
description: No owned middleware. The `webhooks.verify` middleware for inbound provider webhooks is owned by the `webhook` module. This module contributes only its per-provider signature-verification STRATEGIES that plug into webhook's registry at boot.

webhooks.verify.reason: Universal signature verification. Configured per-provider via `webhooks.verify:notifications-mail.webhook_secrets.mailgun,notifications-mail.webhook_secrets.mailgun_previous` (etc). This module ships the per-provider strategy classes (MailgunSignatureStrategy, SendgridSignatureStrategy, SesSignatureStrategy, PostmarkSignatureStrategy, ResendSignatureStrategy) registered with webhook's SignatureStrategyRegistry at boot.

providerStrategies.description: Per-provider signature verification strategies. Each implements Academorix\Webhook\Contracts\SignatureStrategyInterface and registers with webhook's registry at boot via NotificationsMailServiceProvider.

strategies.verifies: X-Twilio-Email-Event-Webhook-Signature header vs SendGrid webhook public key
Authorization header vs configured basic pair
